patterns.title: Single Primary Action Per Region
patterns.description: Each major surface region should have at most one visually dominant primary action.

patterns.title: Explicit State Coverage
patterns.description: Loading, empty, error, and success states are declared where relevant.

patterns.title: Progressive Disclosure
patterns.description: Advanced options remain accessible without overwhelming the default path.

patterns.title: Operator Dense Table Controls
patterns.description: Search, filter, sort, and bulk actions are grouped for repeated operational use.

patterns.title: Purposeful Accent Usage
patterns.description: Accent color or emphasis is reserved for navigation landmarks, status, primary actions, selected musical objects, or a justified brand signature.

patterns.title: Register Fit Palette
patterns.description: Color choices come from the selected profile register and subject matter, with semantic tokens preferred over one-off component colors.

patterns.title: Register Fit Spacing
patterns.description: Whitespace is used to separate meaningful groups and set rhythm, with density chosen for the active product, brand, operations, or music surface.

patterns.title: Subject Grounded Signature
patterns.description: A memorable visual or interaction detail is allowed when it is grounded in the product subject and improves orientation, feedback, or comprehension.
